case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. BRUNNO ALYSSON TOME DE SOUZA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRUNNO ALYSSON TOME DE SOUZA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE SOUZA, BRUNNO ALYSSON TOME $845.15 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $925.15 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 02/06/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $845.15 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DE SOUZA, BRUNNO ALYSSON TOME ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED DEC-23-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DE SOUZA, BRUNNO ALYSSON TOME
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
